name: getFlagShowPulsars
description: Returns whether pulsars are displayed on the sky.

name: setFlagShowPulsars
description: Shows or hides pulsars on the sky.
example: Pulsars.setFlagShowPulsars(true);

name: pulsarsVisible
description: Property that controls whether pulsars are displayed. This is the recommended way to read/write this setting.
returnDescription: true if pulsars are visible, false if hidden

name: getFilteredMode
description: Returns whether filtering of pulsars is enabled. When enabled, only pulsars with DM (Dispersion Measure) less than the filter value are shown.
returnDescription: true if filtering is enabled, false if disabled

name: setFilteredMode
description: Enables or disables filtering of pulsars. When enabled, only pulsars with DM (Dispersion Measure) less than the filter value are shown.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable filtering, false to disable

name: getFilterValue
description: Returns the current DM (Dispersion Measure) filter value in pc/cm³. Only pulsars with DM less than this value are shown when filtering is enabled. Default is 150.
example:
var filterValue = Pulsars.getFilterValue();
core.debug("DM filter value: " + filterValue + " pc/cm³");

name: setFilterValue
description: Sets the DM (Dispersion Measure) filter value in pc/cm³. Only pulsars with DM less than this value are shown when filtering is enabled.

name: getDisplayMode
description: Returns whether distribution mode is enabled for pulsars (showing density distribution rather than individual markers).
returnDescription: true if distribution mode is enabled, false if not

name: setDisplayMode
description: Enables or disables distribution mode for pulsars (showing density distribution rather than individual markers).

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable distribution mode, false to disable

name: flagDisplayMode
description: Property that controls whether pulsar distribution mode is enabled.
returnDescription: true if distribution mode is enabled
example: core.setStelProperty('Pulsars.flagDisplayMode', true);

name: getGlitchFlag
description: Returns whether a separate color is used for pulsars that have experienced glitches (sudden changes in rotation period).
returnDescription: true if separate color is used for glitching pulsars

name: setGlitchFlag
description: Sets whether a separate color should be used for pulsars that have experienced glitches.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to use separate color for glitching pulsars, false to use same color

name: flagGlitchMode
description: Property that controls whether glitching pulsars have a separate color.
returnDescription: true if separate color is used for glitching pulsars
example: core.setStelProperty('Pulsars.flagGlitchMode', true);

name: getMarkerColor
description: Returns the color used for normal pulsar markers. Default is blue (0.4, 0.5, 1.0).
returnDescription: RGB color vector with values from 0.0 to 1.0
example:
var color = Pulsars.getMarkerColor();
core.debug("Pulsar marker color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setMarkerColor
description: Sets the color for normal pulsar markers.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: markerColor
description: ⚠️ Property that returns the normal pulsar marker color. For reading, use core.getStelProperty(). For writing, use Pulsars.setMarkerColor().

compatibility.notes: Q_PROPERTY exposed to scripting (read via core.getStelProperty, write via method)

name: getGlitchColor
description: Returns the color used for pulsars with glitches (when glitch mode is enabled). Default is darker blue (0.2, 0.3, 1.0).
returnDescription: RGB color vector with values from 0.0 to 1.0
example:
var color = Pulsars.getGlitchColor();
core.debug("Glitching pulsar color: RGB(" + color[0] + ", " + color[1] + ", " + color[2] + ")");

name: setGlitchColor
description: Sets the color for pulsars with glitches.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: RGB color vector with values between 0.0 and 1.0

name: glitchColor
description: ⚠️ Property that returns the glitching pulsar marker color. For reading, use core.getStelProperty(). For writing, use Pulsars.setGlitchColor().

compatibility.notes: Q_PROPERTY exposed to scripting (read via core.getStelProperty, write via method)

example: var colorStr = core.getStelProperty('Pulsars.glitchColor');

name: getCountPulsars
description: Returns the number of pulsars currently loaded in the catalog. The default ATNF catalog contains approximately 2,800 pulsars.
returnDescription: Number of pulsars in the catalog
example:
var count = Pulsars.getCountPulsars();
core.debug("Pulsars in catalog: " + count);

name: getUpdatesEnabled
description: Returns whether automatic updates of the pulsar catalog from the internet are enabled.
returnDescription: true if automatic updates are enabled, false if disabled

name: setUpdatesEnabled
description: Enables or disables automatic updates of the pulsar catalog from the internet.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: true to enable automatic updates, false to disable

name: updateJSON
description: Manually triggers an immediate update of the pulsar catalog JSON file from the configured online source (default: https://stellarium.org/json/pulsars.json).

name: getLastUpdate
description: Returns the date and time of the last successful pulsar catalog update.
returnDescription: Date and time of last catalog update
example:
var lastUpdate = Pulsars.getLastUpdate();
core.debug("Last pulsar catalog update: " + lastUpdate.toString());

name: getUpdateFrequencyDays
description: Returns the frequency of automatic catalog updates in days. Default is 100 days.
example:
var freq = Pulsars.getUpdateFrequencyDays();
core.debug("Update frequency: " + freq + " days");

name: setUpdateFrequencyDays
description: Sets the frequency of automatic catalog updates in days.

name: getSecondsToUpdate
description: Returns the number of seconds until the next scheduled automatic catalog update.
example:
var secs = Pulsars.getSecondsToUpdate();
core.debug("Next update in: " + secs + " seconds");

name: getUpdateState
description: Returns the current update state. Values: 0=Updating, 1=CompleteNoUpdates, 2=CompleteUpdates, 3=DownloadError, 4=OtherError.

name: getEnableAtStartup
description: Returns whether the Pulsars plugin should be enabled automatically when Stellarium starts.
returnDescription: true if enabled at startup, false otherwise

name: setEnableAtStartup
description: Sets whether the Pulsars plugin should be enabled automatically when Stellarium starts.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: true to enable at startup, false to disable

name: getFlagShowPulsarsButton
description: Returns whether the Pulsars plugin toolbar button is visible in the Stellarium GUI.
returnDescription: true if button is visible, false if hidden

name: setFlagShowPulsarsButton
description: Shows or hides the Pulsars plugin toolbar button in the Stellarium GUI.

parameters.name: visible
parameters.description: true to show button, false to hide

name: restoreDefaults
description: Restores all Pulsars plugin settings and catalog to their default values. This will reset visibility, colors, filter settings, and replace the catalog file.

name: getByID
description: Returns a pulsar object by its designation ID (e.g., 'PSR J0534+2200' for Crab Pulsar, 'PSR B1919+21').
returnDescription: Pulsar object, or null if not found

compatibility.notes: Returns a PulsarP object with methods like getEnglishName(), getPeriod(), getDM(), etc.

name: getAllPulsars
description: Returns the list of all pulsar objects currently loaded in the catalog.

name: searchByID
description: Searches for a pulsar by its designation ID. Returns a StelObjectP that can be used with core.moveToObject() and other object functions.
returnDescription: Pulsar as StelObject, or null if not found

compatibility.notes: Alternative to getByID() that returns StelObjectP

name: searchByName
description: Searches for a pulsar by its English name, J2000 designation, or B1950 designation.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Pulsar name or designation (e.g., 'Crab Pulsar', 'PSR J0534+2200', 'PSR B1919+21')

returnDescription: Pulsar object, or null if not found

name: listAllObjects
description: Returns a list of all pulsar objects with their names. This can be used for auto-completion and search.

parameters.name: inEnglish
parameters.description: true to list English names, false for translated names

example:
var objects = Pulsars.listAllObjects(false);
core.debug("Total pulsars in catalog: " + objects.length);

name: getName
description: Returns the display name of the Pulsars plugin module.
example:
var name = Pulsars.getName();
core.debug("Module: " + name);

name: getStelObjectType
description: Returns the object type identifier for pulsars. Used by StelObjectMgr to identify objects from this module.
example:
var objType = Pulsars.getStelObjectType();
core.debug("Object type: " + objType); // Returns 'Pulsar'
